task_title: Test build_knowledge_section inline vs reference formatting

phase_history.output:
10/10 tests pass. Added `borg-rs/crates/borg-agent/tests/knowledge_section_tests.rs` covering:

- **Empty input** → returns empty string
- **Reference files** (non-inline): path-only with no description, and with `: description` appended
- **Inline files with content**: no description produces `` - **name**:\n```\ncontent\n``` ``, with description produces `` - **name** (desc):\n```\ncontent\n``` ``
- **Inline files with empty/whitespace-only content**: falls back to name-only (`- **name**\n`) or name + description (`: desc`) — no code fence emitted
- **Missing file** (read error → empty default): same empty-content fallback path
- **Multiple files**: header appears once, all entries present in order
